thuls.name: Thul Avenar
thuls.description: The main assembly site. This is where the work from the other Thul sites was brought together and the Great Machine was built.

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Thul Avenar — The Heart of the Great Work

Thul Avenar served as the central nexus where all research from the outlying Thul sites converged. Here, the greatest arcanists of Netheril assembled the components of the Great Machine — an artifact of staggering ambition designed to reshape the very fabric of magical law.

The site itself occupies a vast underground complex, its halls lined with crystalline conduits that once pulsed with raw mythic energy.

thuls.name: Thul Vharak
thuls.description: The mountain shielding site beneath Mount Ghakis / the Amber Temple complex. The place for arcane shields, warding, containment, and defensive latticework.

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Thul Vharak — The Warden's Bastion

Buried deep beneath Mount Ghakis, below the Amber Temple, Thul Vharak was Netheril's primary research facility for shielding and protective magic. Its arcanists specialized in ward-craft, containment lattices, and defensive enchantments capable of withstanding even divine-level assault.

The facility's position was chosen deliberately — the natural ley-line convergence beneath the mountain amplified protective enchantments tenfold.

research.title: Shielding Research
research.content:
Primary Research: Arcane Shielding & Protection

Thul Vharak's researchers developed ward-lattices capable of deflecting mythic-level energy. Their work formed the defensive backbone of the Great Machine.

Key breakthroughs:
• Crystalline Shield Matrix — A lattice of interlocking ward-stones
• Vharak's Bulwark — A 10th-level shielding spell (now lost)
• Amber Containment Protocol — Used to seal dangerous extraplanar entities

personnel.title: Personnel Records
personnel.content:
Thul Vharak Personnel Registry

Facility Director: Archmage Luvran the Shielded
 — Master of Wards, 3rd Circle of Netherese High Magic

Head Researcher: Tessara of the Amber Eye
 — Specialist in Planar Containment

Chief Artificer: Grundahl Ironweave
 — Construct maintenance and ward-stone fabrication

Senior Arcanist: Phaedra Sunless
 — Ley-line mapping and energy routing

Guard Captain: Varek Stonehelm
 — Commander of the Vharak Sentinels

thuls.name: Thul Seyr
thuls.description: The veil-piercing site. This was where they studied passage between worlds, planes, realms, and even time.

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Thul Seyr — The Veil-Piercer

Thul Seyr was Netheril's most secretive facility, dedicated to the study of planar boundaries, temporal mechanics, and reality manipulation. Its researchers could open portals to other planes and — some whispered — other times entirely.

The facility exists in a state of partial phase-shift, portions of its structure flickering between the Material Plane and the Border Ethereal.

thuls.name: Thul Mystren
thuls.description: The crystal and power-routing site. Tied to mythallar crystals and channeling power from mythallars into smaller systems.

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Thul Mystren — The Crystal Nexus

Thul Mystren was dedicated to the study of illusion magic and the arcane properties of mythallar crystals — what later ages would call Ioun Stones. Its researchers worked on channeling raw mythic power through crystalline matrices to fuel enchantments across vast distances.

thuls.name: Thul Karath
thuls.description: The construct site. Automatons, command lattices, crystal memory, and construct cores.

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Thul Karath — The Forge of Minds

Thul Karath specialized in the creation of magical constructs, arcane automatons, and crystal-based memory systems. Its artificers could imbue non-living matter with a semblance of intelligence through carefully inscribed command lattices.

thuls.name: Thul Oraph
thuls.description: The observation site. Long-range divination, remote sensing, and locating fixed points across realms.

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Thul Oraph — The Far-Seeing Eye

Thul Oraph was Netheril's premier divination facility. Its purpose was to map the planes, locate fixed points in reality, and provide the other Thul sites with targeting data for their experiments. The arcanists of Oraph could observe events across continents and even peer into other planes of existence.
